workflow_rationale: This is a multi-service feature that adds batch operation capabilities across the frontend UI, API layer, database schema, and background job processing. It follows the FEATURE workflow: Database → Backend API → Worker/Queue → Frontend UI → Integration.

phases.name: Database Schema for Batch Jobs
phases.description: Add batch_jobs table to track background operations with status, progress, and result metadata

subtasks.description: Add batch_jobs table schema to Drizzle
subtasks.notes: Added batchJobTypeEnum, batchJobStatusEnum, and batchJobs table to schema.ts. Also resolved a pre-existing merge conflict in 0000_snapshot.json. Migration 0002_cuddly_unus.sql generated successfully with correct CREATE TABLE, enums, indexes, and foreign keys.

Applied migration via psql. Created batch_job_status enum ('pending','processing','completed','failed','cancelled'), batch_job_type enum ('extract_insights','generate_content','batch_archive','batch_delete'), and batch_jobs table with all columns, indexes, and foreign keys. drizzle-kit push has interactive prompts in this environment so SQL was applied directly.

phases.name: Batch Operation API Endpoints
phases.description: Create API routes for batch operations on sessions, insights, and posts with authentication and workspace access control

subtasks.description: Create batch extract insights API endpoint
subtasks.notes: Created POST /api/sessions/batch route at apps/dashboard/src/app/api/sessions/batch/route.ts. Validates operation (extract_insights), sessionIds array, and workspaceSlug. Creates batch_job record in DB with pending status and metadata containing sessionIds. Enqueues job to /api/jobs/process (non-blocking). Returns 202 with jobId, status, and totalItems. Build verified successfully.

subtasks.description: Create batch generate content API endpoint
subtasks.notes: Created POST /api/insights/batch at apps/dashboard/src/app/api/insights/batch/route.ts. Validates operation (generate_content), insightIds array, and workspaceSlug. Creates batch_job record with generate_content type, enqueues to /api/jobs/process (non-blocking), returns 202 with jobId, status, and totalItems. Build verified successfully.

subtasks.description: Create batch post operations API endpoint
subtasks.notes: Created POST /api/posts/batch at apps/dashboard/src/app/api/posts/batch/route.ts. Validates operation (archive|delete|publish|unpublish), postIds array, and workspaceSlug. Creates batch_job record with batch_archive or batch_delete type (based on operation), stores operation and postIds in metadata. Enqueues job to /api/jobs/process (non-blocking). Returns 202 with jobId, status, and totalItems. Build verified with tsc.

Created GET /api/jobs/[jobId]/route.ts following the sessions/[id]/route.ts pattern. Returns batch job status scoped to the authenticated user's workspace. TypeScript compilation passes with no errors.

phases.name: QStash Background Job Processor
phases.description: Implement QStash-based background job processor for long-running batch operations with progress tracking

subtasks.notes: Created apps/dashboard/src/lib/queue/job-tracker.ts with createJob(), updateJobProgress(), completeJob(), failJob(), cancelJob(), and getJob() utility functions. All use Drizzle ORM to read/write batch_jobs table. Build verified successfully.

subtasks.description: Create batch processor with QStash integration
subtasks.notes: Created apps/dashboard/src/lib/queue/batch-processor.ts with processExtractInsights(), processGenerateContent(), and processPostBatch() functions. Each processes items one-by-one with progress tracking, error isolation per item, cancellation checks, and rate limiting delays (500ms) between AI API calls. Uses job-tracker for DB updates and extractInsight / generateContentFromInsight (inline non-streaming blog writer) / direct Drizzle ORM for post operations. Build verified successfully.

subtasks.description: Create QStash webhook handler for job execution
subtasks.notes: Created POST /api/jobs/process at apps/dashboard/src/app/api/jobs/process/route.ts. Receives jobId in request body, loads job from DB using getJob(), returns 200 (skipped:true) for unknown or non-pending jobs (idempotency). Dispatches to processExtractInsights, processGenerateContent, or processPostBatch based on job.type, passing IDs and params from job metadata. Processors run fire-and-forget (errors suppressed). Returns 200 with {jobId, status:'processing'}. Build verified successfully.

phases.name: React Hooks for Batch Operations
phases.description: Create reusable React Query hooks for triggering batch operations and polling job progress

subtasks.notes: Created apps/dashboard/src/hooks/use-batch-operations.ts with useExtractInsightsBatch, useGenerateContentBatch, useArchivePostsBatch, and useDeletePostsBatch hooks. Each uses useMutation to call the corresponding batch API endpoint and invalidates relevant query caches on success. Returns BatchJobResult with jobId, status, and totalItems. Build verified successfully.

Created apps/dashboard/src/hooks/use-job-progress.ts with useJobProgress(jobId) hook. Polls /api/jobs/[jobId] every 2 seconds while job is pending/processing. Returns JobProgress with status, totalItems, processedItems, successItems, failedItems, progressPercent, estimatedSecondsRemaining, and timestamps. Stops polling automatically when status reaches completed/failed/cancelled. Build verified successfully.

phases.name: Multi-Select UI Components
phases.description: Add multi-select checkboxes, shift-click range selection, and batch operation toolbars to sessions, insights, and posts pages

subtasks.notes: Created MultiSelectToolbar component at apps/dashboard/src/components/batch/multi-select-toolbar.tsx. Shows selected count, Select All (with total), Clear, and a children slot for action buttons. Renders null when selectedCount is 0. Build verified successfully.

Created JobProgressModal component at apps/dashboard/src/components/batch/job-progress-modal.tsx. Displays animated progress bar, processed/total item counts, success/failure counts, ETA, and cancel button. Uses useJobProgress hook for real-time polling. Auto-closes 3 seconds after completion. Build verified successfully.

checks: 'Extract Insights' button appears when items selected

subtasks.notes: Add useState for selected session IDs. Add checkbox to each session card. Implement shift-click range selection. Show MultiSelectToolbar when selections exist. Add 'Extract Insights' button that triggers batch operation.

checks: 'Generate Content' button appears when items selected

subtasks.notes: Similar to sessions page. Add multi-select with 'Generate Blog Post', 'Generate Twitter Thread', etc. buttons in toolbar.

Add multi-select with 'Archive', 'Delete', 'Publish', 'Unpublish' buttons. Post operations are simpler (no AI required), so they can show immediate feedback without job progress modal for simple operations.

phases.name: End-to-End Integration & Polish
phases.description: Wire all pieces together, test complete batch operation flows, add rate limiting, usage metering, and error handling

subtasks.description: Add rate limiting to batch operations

verification.instructions: Trigger batch operation with 20+ items. Verify that Anthropic API calls are rate-limited (e.g., max 5 concurrent requests) and don't hit rate limit errors.

subtasks.notes: Add rate limiting for Anthropic API calls (insight extraction, content generation). Use a simple queue or delay between requests to avoid hitting rate limits.

subtasks.description: Add usage metering for batch operations

verification.instructions: Trigger batch operation with 10 items. Verify that each item counts toward usage limits (if usage metering system exists).

subtasks.notes: If usage metering system exists, ensure each batch item is tracked individually. If not, add TODO comment for future implementation.

subtasks.description: End-to-end test: Extract insights from multiple sessions

steps: Progress bar updates as items are processed
Modal shows completion with success/error counts
Navigate to insights page and verify new insights were created

subtasks.notes: Full flow test for batch insight extraction

subtasks.description: End-to-end test: Generate content from multiple insights

steps: Progress updates as posts are generated
Navigate to content page and verify new blog posts were created

subtasks.notes: Full flow test for batch content generation

steps: Posts are archived immediately (or progress modal if async)

subtasks.notes: Full flow test for batch post operations

steps: Trigger batch operation with many items (20+)
Click 'Cancel' button in progress modal while job is processing
No new items are processed after cancellation

subtasks.notes: Verify job cancellation works correctly

parallel_groups.reason: Backend API can be developed in parallel with database schema after phase 1 completes
Frontend hooks can be developed in parallel with background worker, both depend on phase-2-backend-api

acceptance_criteria: Users can multi-select sessions, insights, and posts using checkboxes and shift-click
Batch operations create background jobs tracked in database
Job progress is displayed in real-time with accurate progress bars
Batch operations can be cancelled mid-execution
All batch operations respect rate limits and don't cause API errors
Each item in batch operation is tracked for usage metering
Error handling works correctly - failed items don't block successful ones
verification_strategy.reasoning: High risk due to: (1) Background job processing with potential for data inconsistency, (2) Rate limiting complexity with external APIs, (3) Multi-user concurrent batch operations, (4) Database transactions for batch updates. Requires comprehensive testing including E2E tests to verify complete flows.

checks: batch_jobs table exists with correct schema
